summary: Nice C‑Miller matrix remaster captures a relaxed, fun show highlighted by Bird Song and The Other One.
review: The recording is a clean C Miller remaster of a matrix source that fans describe as “nice” with no major sound issues.  Listeners recall the concert as one of the most enjoyable experiences, especially noting the soaring Bird Song and an inspired The Other One.  Overall the performance feels relaxed and memorable despite the lack of detailed technical commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers gave 4‑star ratings, praising both the show’s vibe and the decent matrix recording; no significant negatives were mentioned.

recording_quality.technical_notes: C Miller remaster of a matrix source; listeners note it sounds nice and clear with no reported dropouts or major flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A relaxed, upbeat atmosphere with the first set setting a mellow tone and memorable moments like Bird Song and The Other One standing out.

band_member_comments.Keys: One reviewer references Brent (Myldand) in a personal anecdote, but no specific performance comment.
